title.en: Interworking and Fast Link Setup: SSPN, Emergency Services, and FILS
title.zh: 互通与快速链路建立：SSPN、紧急服务与 FILS

blocks.en: A Wi-Fi BSS is rarely an island. A coffee-shop hotspot, an airport network, a carrier's roaming partner — all of them want to plug the radio link into a bigger world: a subscriber database, an emergency-call service, a billing relationship. Clause 11 of 802.11 calls this family of mechanisms 'interworking', and it answers two practical questions a station has on arrival: what does this network actually offer me, and how do I get on it without a dozen slow round trips?
blocks.zh: 一个 Wi-Fi BSS 很少是一座孤岛。咖啡馆热点、机场网络、运营商的漫游伙伴——它们都希望把这条无线链路接入一个更大的世界：用户数据库、紧急呼叫服务、计费关系。802.11 第 11 章把这一系列机制称为“互通（interworking）”，它回答了站点到达时的两个现实问题：这个网络究竟能给我提供什么，以及我如何不经过十几次缓慢的往返就接入它。

blocks.en: Start with who you are to the network. When an AP enables the SSPN (Subscription Service Provider Network) interface, it doesn't decide a user's permissions on its own — it talks to the subscriber's home network. During the RSN security handshake the SSPN pushes down per-user policy, which the AP stores in an interworking table entry and then enforces: authentication and authorization decisions, admission control, and even per-access-category byte budgets (voice, video, best-effort, background). If you exhaust your authorized voice octets, the AP tears down or denies new voice streams. If your cipher suite is too weak, or you are in a forbidden location, the SSPN can have you disassociated with a specific reason code.
blocks.zh: 先从“你对网络而言是谁”说起。当 AP 启用 SSPN（签约服务提供商网络）接口时，它并不会自行决定某个用户的权限——而是与该用户的归属网络对话。在 RSN 安全握手期间，SSPN 会下发逐用户的策略，AP 把它存进一条互通表项（interworking table entry）中，随后据此执行：认证与授权决策、准入控制，甚至各接入类别（语音、视频、尽力而为、后台）的字节配额。如果你用尽了被授权的语音字节数，AP 会拆除或拒绝新的语音流。如果你的加密套件太弱，或你处在禁用区域，SSPN 可以让你被去关联，并附上特定的原因码。

blocks.en: Next, what the network advertises before you even associate. An AP can flag that it supports emergency services in the Interworking element, and signal in two bits (ESR and UESA) whether emergency calls are reachable and whether they work even for an unauthenticated station — so a phone with no credentials can still dial for help. Separately, a Roaming Consortium element lists the organization identifiers (OIs) of service providers whose credentials this AP can authenticate, letting a station pick a network it already has an account with. And a QoS Map element tells the station how the upstream network's DSCP markings map to Wi-Fi user priorities, so traffic keeps the right priority end to end instead of being mis-classified at the air interface.
blocks.zh: 其次，是网络在你关联之前就对外公布的信息。AP 可以在 Interworking 元素中标明自己支持紧急服务，并用两个比特（ESR 与 UESA）指示紧急呼叫是否可达、以及是否对未认证的站点也可用——这样一部没有任何凭据的手机仍然能拨打求助电话。另外，Roaming Consortium（漫游联盟）元素列出了该 AP 能够认证其凭据的服务提供商的组织标识符（OI），让站点挑选一个自己已经拥有账户的网络。而 QoS Map 元素则告诉站点上游网络的 DSCP 标记如何映射到 Wi-Fi 的用户优先级，使流量端到端保持正确的优先级，而不会在空口被错误分类。

caption.en: Interworking links the air interface to the wider world: the AP enforces SSPN policy, advertises emergency-service reachability, and lists roaming-consortium OIs a station can authenticate against.
caption.zh: 互通把空口连接到更广阔的世界：AP 执行 SSPN 策略、公布紧急服务可达性，并列出站点可用于认证的漫游联盟 OI。

blocks.en: Now the speed problem. The classic join is chatty: scan, then authenticate, then associate, then run DHCP and key exchange — many separate round trips before a single packet of real traffic flows. Fast Initial Link Setup (FILS) compresses this. A FILS AP can broadcast a lightweight FILS Discovery frame — much smaller and more frequent than a full Beacon — carrying just enough (SSID, capabilities, optional RSN and minimum-rate hints, a timestamp) for a scanning station to find the BSS and decide to engage, without waiting for the next Beacon. On the 6 GHz band, where blindly scanning every channel is expensive, this frame doubles as a cheap beacon-like signpost.
blocks.zh: 现在来看速度问题。经典的入网过程很“啰嗦”：扫描，然后认证，然后关联，再跑 DHCP 和密钥交换——在真正的第一个数据包流动之前要经过许多次独立往返。快速初始链路建立（FILS）压缩了这一切。FILS AP 可以广播一种轻量的 FILS Discovery 帧——它比完整的 Beacon 更小、发送更频繁——只携带刚好够用的信息（SSID、能力、可选的 RSN 与最低速率提示、一个时间戳），让正在扫描的站点不必等下一个 Beacon 就能发现该 BSS 并决定是否接入。在 6 GHz 频段，盲扫每个信道代价高昂，这种帧就兼作一种低成本的、类似信标的路标。

blocks.en: FILS also folds higher-layer setup into the association exchange itself. Instead of associating and then separately running DHCP, a FILS station can carry higher-layer protocol packets inside FILS HLP Container elements in its (Re)Association Request — or use FILS IP address configuration, a lightweight stand-in for DHCP — so it can come away from association already holding an IP address. All of this higher-layer payload rides inside an authenticated-encryption (AEAD) wrapper, so the shortcut doesn't cost security. The result is roughly 'get on the network in one breath' instead of many.
blocks.zh: FILS 还把高层建立过程折叠进关联交换本身。FILS 站点不必先关联、再单独跑 DHCP，而是可以把高层协议报文装进 (Re)Association Request 中的 FILS HLP Container 元素里——或者使用 FILS IP 地址配置（一种 DHCP 的轻量替代）——从而在关联结束时就已经拿到了一个 IP 地址。所有这些高层载荷都包裹在认证加密（AEAD）封装之中，因此这条捷径并不以牺牲安全为代价。最终效果大致是“一口气接入网络”，而不是经历许多次往返。

blocks.en:
graph LR
  subgraph Classic["Classic join"]
    A1[Scan] --> A2[Auth] --> A3[Assoc] --> A4[DHCP / keys]
  end
  subgraph FILS["FILS"]
    B1["FILS Discovery\nframe"] --> B2["(Re)Assoc carries\nHLP / FILS IP\n(AEAD-protected)"]
  end
  A4 -.fewer round trips.-> B2
blocks.zh:
graph LR
  subgraph Classic["经典入网"]
    A1[扫描] --> A2[认证] --> A3[关联] --> A4[DHCP / 密钥]
  end
  subgraph FILS["FILS"]
    B1["FILS Discovery\n帧"] --> B2["(Re)Assoc 携带\nHLP / FILS IP\n（AEAD 保护）"]
  end
  A4 -.更少往返.-> B2

blocks.en: Discovery and on-ramp are separable. A 2.4/5 GHz AP that shares a location with a 6 GHz AP advertises that neighbor in a Reduced Neighbor Report element — operating channel, class, BSSID — so a station learns the 6 GHz BSS exists out-of-band, without sweeping all of UNII looking for it. Pair that out-of-band signpost with a FILS Discovery frame and a FILS association, and a 6 GHz radio can be found and joined with very little airtime spent guessing.
blocks.zh: “发现”与“入网”是可以分离的。一个与 6 GHz AP 处于同一地点的 2.4/5 GHz AP，会在 Reduced Neighbor Report（精简邻居报告）元素中通告那个邻居——工作信道、操作类、BSSID——这样站点就能通过带外（out-of-band）方式得知 6 GHz BSS 的存在，而无需扫遍整个 UNII 去寻找它。把这种带外路标与 FILS Discovery 帧、FILS 关联结合起来，一个 6 GHz 射频就能在几乎不浪费空口时间去猜测的情况下被发现并接入。

summary.en: Where the standard pins the bits: SSPN enforcement, FILS Discovery cadence, and the RNR signpost
summary.zh: 标准把这些细节落在何处：SSPN 执行、FILS Discovery 节奏与 RNR 路标

blocks.en: On the SSPN side (11.22.5), when dot11SSPNInterfaceActivated is true the AP stores SSPN-supplied permissions in a dot11InterworkingTableEntry created on successful association, enforces per-AC octet ceilings (e.g. dot11NonAPStationVoiceOctetCount vs dot11NonAPStationAuthMaxVoiceOctets), and disassociates with codes like BAD_CIPHER_OR_AKM or NOT_AUTHORIZED_THIS_LOCATION when the SSPN rejects. Emergency support (11.22.6) keys off dot11ESNetwork and Table 11-21's ESR/UESA pairing. Roaming OIs (11.22.8) appear in the Roaming Consortium element only if the AP can actually authenticate that OI's credentials in conjunction with an AS; QoS mapping (11.22.9) rides the QoS Map field and element. FILS itself (11.45) is infrastructure-only, non-DMG/non-S1G: the FILS Discovery frame (11.45.2) is broadcast at a mandatory PHY rate, should appear every beacon interval bounded by dot11FILSFDFrameBeaconMinimumInterval, lets a scanning STA compute the next TBTT from the Timestamp subfield, and on 6 GHz must include a Transmit Power Envelope element. Higher-layer setup (11.45.3) offers HLP encapsulation (mandatory for FILS STAs) and optional FILS IP address configuration, both protected by AEAD (12.11.2.7). Out-of-band 6 GHz discovery (11.53) requires a colocated 2.4/5 GHz AP to carry a Reduced Neighbor Report with the Colocated AP subfield set to 1, giving operating channels/classes so a STA need not scan all of UNII.
blocks.zh: 在 SSPN 一侧（11.22.5），当 dot11SSPNInterfaceActivated 为真时，AP 把 SSPN 下发的权限存入关联成功时创建的 dot11InterworkingTableEntry，执行各接入类别的字节上限（例如用 dot11NonAPStationVoiceOctetCount 与 dot11NonAPStationAuthMaxVoiceOctets 比较），并在 SSPN 拒绝时用 BAD_CIPHER_OR_AKM 或 NOT_AUTHORIZED_THIS_LOCATION 等原因码去关联。紧急支持（11.22.6）取决于 dot11ESNetwork 以及表 11-21 中 ESR/UESA 的取值组合。漫游 OI（11.22.8）只有在 AP 确实能配合 AS 认证该 OI 的凭据时，才会出现在 Roaming Consortium 元素中；QoS 映射（11.22.9）依托 QoS Map 字段与元素。FILS 本身（11.45）仅用于基础设施 BSS，且非 DMG/非 S1G：FILS Discovery 帧（11.45.2）以强制 PHY 速率广播，应在每个 beacon interval 内出现并受 dot11FILSFDFrameBeaconMinimumInterval 约束，让扫描中的 STA 可从 Timestamp 子字段推算下一个 TBTT，在 6 GHz 上还必须包含 Transmit Power Envelope 元素。高层建立（11.45.3）提供 HLP 封装（FILS STA 必备）与可选的 FILS IP 地址配置，二者都受 AEAD（12.11.2.7）保护。带外 6 GHz 发现（11.53）要求一个同地点的 2.4/5 GHz AP 携带 Colocated AP 子字段置 1 的 Reduced Neighbor Report，给出工作信道与操作类，使 STA 无需扫遍整个 UNII。

cites.note: 11.22.5 Interworking with SSPN — dot11InterworkingTableEntry, per-AC octet limits, disassociation reason codes
11.22.6 emergency services support — dot11ESNetwork, Interworking element Access Network Type, Table 11-21 ESR/UESA
11.22.8 Roaming Consortium element OIs; 11.22.9 QoS mapping from external networks via QoS Map field/element
11.45.2 FILS Discovery frame generation/usage — mandatory rate, beacon-interval cadence, 6 GHz TPE, TBTT from Timestamp
11.45.3 higher layer setup during (re)association — FILS HLP Container, FILS IP address configuration, AEAD protection
11.53 out-of-band discovery of a 6 GHz BSS — Reduced Neighbor Report with Colocated AP subfield, operating channels/classes
